feat: Buddhi REDIRECT on any tool failure — infrastructure forces retry

The LLM is a pattern matcher. Without infrastructure intervention, it
sees "error" and says "sorry". Now ANY failed tool triggers a REDIRECT
verdict, forcing the LLM to try alternatives. Gandha patterns still
fire first for specific failures (edit_file_not_found, route_miss).

commit.message:
feat: SROTRA hears GitHub — remote sense perception + prompt injection

GitSense now perceives CI status and open PRs via gh CLI (GhClient with
rate limiting, exponential backoff, auto-offline). Sense data + gap data
are injected into the effective system prompt so the agent actually sees
its environment. Session ledger deliberately NOT injected — learning is
infrastructure (Hebbian/Chitta/Gandha), not LLM prompt bloat.

commit.message:
Fix alarm persistence and add canvas keyboard navigation

Alarm persistence fix:
- TagEngine.historian is async-initialized; DataService was assigning it
  while still nil, causing all alarm save/load calls to silently fail.
- Added onHistorianReady callback to TagEngine; DataService wires
  AlarmManager/RecipeStore/Scheduler historian references and calls
  loadFromDB() only after the DB is confirmed ready.

Process canvas keyboard navigation (click canvas first):
  Arrow keys        Pan 20pt (Shift = 100pt)
  = / +             Zoom in x1.25
  -                 Zoom out x0.8
  0                 Fit all blocks to window
  Mouse click       Gives canvas keyboard focus

commit.message:
feat(web): real Stacks wallet connect with SIP-018 auth and signing

Server:
- auth.ts: add Format 2 (SIP-018 wallet) auth path alongside existing
  Format 1 (raw ECDSA). Wallet auth uses stx_signStructuredMessage with
  domain name='Stackmail', version='0.6.0'. Exported AUTH_DOMAIN constant.
- app.ts: expose authDomain and sfVersion in GET /status response

Web UI (index.html):
- Connect Wallet button (header + status card) detects Leather, Xverse,
  and any window.StacksProvider-compatible wallet
- stx_getAddresses → wallet address + compressed public key
- buildWalletAuthHeader: SIP-018 structured data signing for inbox auth
  (Format 2); falls back gracefully if wallet doesn't support it
- sip018SignWithWallet: signs StackFlow payment proofs via
  stx_signStructuredMessage — wallet shows user exactly what they sign
- queryOnChainTap: reads live pipe state from sm-stackflow via Hiro API
  and shows it in the compose tab; links to explorer to create a tap
- Both modes (wallet + ephemeral session key) coexist; all existing
  session-key functionality unchanged

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix setup.sh replica dependency and grader.py namespace bug

- Remove StatefulSet scaling to 2 replicas (only pod-0 exists in base env)
- Remove replica pg_hba.conf fix from both setup.sh and solution.sh
- Fix grader.py s4 check: pgbouncer-config-integrity-checker is in bleater
  namespace, not monitoring

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: eliminate synchronous DB calls from main thread (#390)

* fix: eliminate synchronous DB calls from main thread

Convert all getDistinct*() methods to cache-only (return {} on miss,
trigger async fetch via requestDistinctValueAsync()). Add grinder_brand
to requestDistinctCache() pre-warm. Make updateTotalShots() async.
Remove 21 dead synchronous methods with zero callers (~1060 lines).
Flag importShotRecord() main-thread violation as TODO.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: address PR review findings for async DB cache safety

- Fix cache poisoning: requestDistinctValueAsync now checks withTempDb
  return value and skips cache insert on DB open failure (allows retry)
- Fix stale data race: clear m_pendingDistinctKeys during full cache
  refresh so in-flight callbacks discard stale results
- Add missing qWarning logging for count query failures in initialize(),
  updateTotalShots(), refreshTotalShots(), and getShotCountStatic()
- Check query.prepare() return value separately from exec()
- Update stale comments referencing removed getShot() method
- Clarify audit doc entries for removed methods and caller descriptions

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: clear coffee field when selecting a new roaster

When selecting a roaster from suggestions, the coffee (bean type) field
was not cleared, leaving a mismatched roaster/coffee combination.
Added onSuggestionSelected to clear bean type in all three locations:
BeanInfoPage, BrewDialog, and PostShotReviewPage.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: ColoredIcon not rendering in picker dialogs

Material style Button adds default insets that squeezed the icon out of
view when ColoredIcon was placed in a Row with explicit width but no
height. Fix by zeroing all insets/padding and setting display to
IconOnly. Also normalize tick.svg to standard Feather icon format and
add explicit height on picker dialog tick usages.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: preserve profile_kb_id on backup restore and remove wasteful delete side-effects

Two fixes from PR review findings:

1. importDatabaseStatic() was missing profile_kb_id in its INSERT,
   silently dropping AI dial-in history data on backup restore/merge.

2. deleteShot() (private, only called from importShotRecord during
   overwrite) was spawning async updateTotalShots threads and cache
   invalidations per deleted shot. These are unnecessary since the
   import batch already calls refreshTotalShots() at completion.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: auto-fill coffee when only one option and clear roast date on roaster change

When selecting a roaster from suggestions:
- Clear coffee (bean type) and roast date since they belong to the prior roaster
- Auto-fill coffee if only one bean type exists for that roaster (matches
  the grinder brand -> model auto-fill pattern)

Applied to BeanInfoPage, BrewDialog, and PostShotReviewPage.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: clear roast date when coffee is changed

A different coffee implies a different roast batch, so clear the roast
date when a new coffee is selected from suggestions.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Rewrite as autoresearch: PyTorch SDF-GAN with autonomous experiment loop

Replace the TF1 multi-file codebase with a clean 3-file autoresearch structure
(inspired by karpathy/autoresearch):

- train.py: single mutable file with model architecture + 3-phase training loop
- program.md: agent instructions for autonomous experimentation

Old TF1 code (src/, run.py, notebooks, configs) moved to TCC-Leon-legacy/ outside
the project directory.

commit.message:
ci: strip libjpeg/libtiff from sysroot, fix Tesseract build

Tesseract uses Leptonica for in-memory Pix operations only; JPEG/TIFF
file I/O is not needed for subtitle OCR. Removing these deps:

- Eliminates libjpeg-turbo and libtiff builds entirely
- Disables JPEG/TIFF in Leptonica (-DENABLE_JPEG=OFF -DENABLE_TIFF=OFF)
- Removes libtiff CMake config patching (no more transitive targets)
- Removes TIFF try_run cross-compile workaround
- Removes DISABLED_LEGACY_ENGINE=ON (causes incomplete-type errors in
  docqual.cpp with Tesseract 5.5.2; legacy engine is simply unused)
- Adds PNG::PNG target patching in Leptonica CMake config

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Comprehensive code review: fix 55 bugs, improve security and accessibility

- main.js: saveSettings returns boolean with rollback on failure, prototype
  pollution defense, improved address validation regex, alarm timer waits for
  all targets, stopPinging guards alarmTimer/captureSession, loadSettings
  validates udp_ip/capture_mode/trims names, startCapture skips 0 active targets
- preload.js: rewrite with EVENT_CHANNELS constant, callback validation,
  unsubscribe handle returns from all on* functions
- renderer.js: start/stop race condition guards, classList.contains fix,
  mute checkbox checks return value, capture settings uses returned object,
  target address validation, duplicate IP warning, null checks, escapeHtml
  single quote support, pathToFileUrl UNC support
- index.html: ARIA accessibility (role="dialog", aria-modal, aria-hidden,
  scope="col", for attributes), type="button" on all buttons, sr-only mute
  checkbox, modal max-width constraints
- styles.css: WCAG AA contrast compliance, sr-only class, focus-visible
  styles, scoped td max-width, disabled button fix, scan line animation fix
- package.json: postinstall native module rebuild, updated files/extraResources
- CLAUDE.md/README.md: updated documentation to reflect all changes

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Rewrite floating animation based on actual Antigravity source code

Replace party-like transparent particles with proper Antigravity-style
physics: solid brand-colored shapes (circles, squares, triangles) with
depth shadows for 3D parallax, negative gravity pulling elements upward,
friction-based air resistance, strong cursor repulsion, and bottom
respawn when shapes float off screen.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: embedding job redesign — stability, speed, and rich UI

- Split embeddings into two-phase processing (compute/write) to avoid
  Neon idle-connection timeouts during Bedrock calls
- Multi-row INSERT replaces N individual upserts per batch
- Add heartbeat (90s TTL) for stale job detection + auto-recovery
- Add pause/resume/clear/config endpoints with Redis state
- Add job activity log (last 50 events) stored in Redis List
- Track speed (prod/min), ETA, chain count, total processed
- New EmbeddingJobPanel component with stats grid, control buttons,
  skipImages toggle, stale warning, and scrollable activity log
- Reduce image fetch timeout from 10s to 5s
- Conditional batch size: 30 (text-only) vs 20 (text+image)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Remove blue-noise dither implementation entirely

The "blue-noise" dither was a fake hash-based approximation, not a proper
void-and-cluster texture. It produced isolated speckles that conflicted with
speckleRescue, causing white spots. Removed rather than fixed — can implement
correctly from a real blue-noise texture if needed later.

- Remove blueNoise(), getBlueNoiseLUT(), cached LUT from DitheringStrategies
- Remove blue-noise routing from SeparationEngine
- Remove normalization entries from ParameterGenerator, default to atkinson
- Remove blue-noise tests (unit + integration)
- 1037 tests passing, zero blue-noise references remain

Fix RF coverage overlay not drawing: match ViewshedTool styledata pattern v0.51.1

The styledata handler was calling cleanup() before initLayers(), which
destroyed all sources/layers and re-created them with empty data. This
also triggered infinite styledata loops. Fixed by using the same pattern
as ViewshedTool: only call initLayers on styledata (no cleanup), and
use refs to preserve current geojson data through style changes.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Two-phase glossary standardization: deterministic + LLM with stronger hints

Phase 1 (deterministic, no LLM):
- Normalise all term names (strip punctuation/case)
- Exact-name duplicates ("Adapter" × 2) merged immediately in Python;
  longest definition wins as canonical

Phase 2 (LLM with targeted hints):
- Hint A: Jaccard word-overlap ≥ 0.35 (lowered from 0.5) flags likely pairs
- Hint B: same first content word (≥5 chars) clusters all "agentic *" terms
  together regardless of the words that follow — catches "Agentic Coding" /
  "Agentic AI Coding" / "Agentic Engineering" as one cluster
- Hints labelled "CONFIRMED or VERY LIKELY duplicates — merge them" so LLM
  cannot treat them as merely related

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

regex, so uploaded photos are correctly proxied to backend.

commit.message:
Switch all archetypes from blue-noise to atkinson dither, add Salamander distilled engine

Blue-noise dither creates isolated speckles that conflict with speckleRescue,
causing white spots in the preview. Atkinson diffuses 3/4 error to neighbors,
producing sharp boundaries without orphan islands.

- Normalize ditherType casing across all archetypes (BlueNoise/blue-noise → atkinson)
- Update schema enum, interpolator model, default archetype, and cinematic preset
- Switch Salamander to distilled engine (over-quantize → FPS) for better minority
  color preservation on background-dominant images
- Update horse test fixture and golden palette for new 16-bit source
- Add integration tests: archetype sweep, mechanical knobs, proxy lifecycle,
  proxy-vs-fullres distribution

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: CLI subprocess SIGINT isolation + regression tests (#888)

* fix: isolate CLI subprocesses from SIGINT to prevent Ctrl+C respawn

Add start_new_session=True to all CLI subprocess spawns (claude, codex,
gemini). Without this, Ctrl+C sends SIGINT to both Python and the child
process. The child handles SIGINT gracefully and exits with a partial
result, causing auto_finish to spawn a new session instead of stopping.

With start_new_session=True, SIGINT only reaches Python. The asyncio
cancellation then propagates through aclosing() which terminates the
subprocess via the finally block. auto_finish is never reached because
CancelledError propagates out of the async with block.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* test: add CLI cancellation regression tests for SIGINT isolation

12 tests covering:
- start_new_session=True enforcement on all 3 CLI providers
- CancelledError/KeyboardInterrupt skip auto_finish (no respawn)
- _ndjson_from_cli finally block propagates CancelledError
- Tool allowlist/blocklist args have no embedded quotes
- Session default is None (no mutable default sharing)
- Empty responses don't IndexError on auto_finish check

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: address review findings — BaseException guard + test CI reliability

- Add explicit _cancelled sentinel in _call() to prevent auto_finish
  after Task.cancel() (not just SIGINT). Both CancelledError and
  KeyboardInterrupt now skip the second spawn unconditionally.
- Remove pytest.skip guards from mocked tests — the mock makes CLI
  binary availability irrelevant. All 13 tests now run on CI without
  skipping.
- Add test_task_cancel_skips_auto_finish covering the Task.cancel()
  path (non-SIGINT cancellation).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

---------

Improve glossary standardization: aggressive merging + fuzzy pre-hints

- Rewrote _STANDARDIZE_SYSTEM prompt to err on the side of merging:
  explicitly lists what ALWAYS gets merged (variations, abbreviations,
  plural/singular, restatements) vs what to keep separate (genuinely
  distinct concepts)
- Added fuzzy pre-grouping: before calling LLM, compute word-overlap
  between all term pairs (Jaccard >= 0.5) and pass the likely-duplicate
  pairs as hints in the prompt so the LLM doesn't miss obvious clusters
  like "Agentic Coding" / "Agentic AI Coding" / "Agentic Engineering"

commit.message:
Initial release: polite, pipeline-friendly web crawler

- CLI with --depth, --max-pages, --delay, --ignore-robots, --topic flags
- Priority frontier queue with URL scoring heuristics (article boost,
  source bonus for sitemap/search, depth penalty)
- Sitemap discovery with recursive sitemap index support
- Topic-based URL discovery via DuckDuckGo HTML search
- robots.txt support via robots-parser with crawl-delay honoring
- URL normalization (tracking param removal, fragment stripping, dedup)
- Same-domain filtering, binary extension rejection
- 49 passing tests across 9 test suites
- CLAUDE.md contributor guide, README with architecture docs
